objective: Make hldpro-sim v0.1.0 consumable by Stampede via version tag, distribution contract doc, and deployer script.
scope_boundary: hldpro-sim-v0.1.0 git tag pointing to PR #411 merge commit
out_of_scope: packages/hldpro-sim source changes (already merged in PR #411)
Stampede adoption PR (Stampede owns that; unblocked once deployer ships)
research_summary: governance-tooling-v0.1.0 (PR #401) is the proven deployer precedent. hldpro-sim v0.1.0 is on main at fed5ead670cf6834e5c73bffcaf64e41cc483fce. No tag or deployer exists yet. Consumer record pattern mirrors .hldpro/governance-tooling.json.

sprints.name: Version tag + distribution contract
sprints.goal: Push hldpro-sim-v0.1.0 tag and commit docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json
tasks: Push git tag hldpro-sim-v0.1.0 pointing to fed5ead670cf6834e5c73bffcaf64e41cc483fce
Write docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json with package + managed personas contract
acceptance_criteria: docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json is valid JSON with schema_version, package, personas sections

sprints.name: Deployer script + dry-run validation
sprints.goal: Write scripts/deployer/deploy-hldpro-sim.sh and prove dry-run against /tmp/sim-consumer-test
tasks: Deployer installs package, deploys personas to sim-personas/shared/, writes .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json
Run dry-run against /tmp/sim-consumer-test and commit validation evidence

specialist_reviews.focus: Scope completeness and deployer contract alignment with governance-tooling-v0.1.0 precedent
specialist_reviews.summary: Two-sprint scope is minimal and complete. Tag + contract doc in sprint 1, deployer + proof in sprint 2. No source changes to hldpro-sim. Aligns with governance-tooling deployer pattern.

alternate_model_review.summary: Non-architecture implementation slice. Same-model exception active (planner and implementer both claude-sonnet-4-6). No cross-review artifact required.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Push hldpro-sim-v0.1.0 tag, commit distribution contract and PDCAR, write deployer script, commit dry-run proof.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Commit plan + scope files, push tag hldpro-sim-v0.1.0, write docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json

material_deviation_rules: If pip-editable install fails in consumer env, fall back to directory copy and record install_method: directory-copy in consumer record
